subject: A towering undead Egyptian-style deity with a hooded skeletal visage and a massive obsidian-bladed scythe-like weapon raised against a stormy sky, surrounded by smaller armored figures
description: A monumental zombified god looms in the foreground, draped in dark blue and black robes with gilded ornamentation, wielding an enormous curved blade in two skeletal hands. The figure's face is hidden in shadow beneath a tall pointed hood, with only a hint of skull beneath. Smaller armored attendants or worshippers cluster at the deity's feet, dwarfed by its scale. The sky behind is a brooding, overcast wash of grey-blue clouds suggesting an oncoming storm or post-battle aftermath. The palette is dominated by deep blues, slate greys, and tarnished gold accents.
foreground: hooded skeletal god-figure wielding a massive curved blade, with smaller attendants below
background: overcast stormy sky with low grey clouds
